name: C-5 --enforce passes when the verifier-output verdict is concur per the architecture
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/sod-gate.sh" --emit v.json --verdict concur --pr-sha abc123 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/sod-gate.sh" --enforce --pr-sha abc123 --verifier-output v.json 2>err.txt && echo concurred 1>&2
